title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude Fable 5 built a solar system simulation by deriving planetary orbital motion from physics first principles and used it to predict solar eclipses. The demonstration shows the model's ability to reason through complex physics problems.
writeup: The video demonstrates Claude Fable 5 building a solar system simulation by deriving planetary orbital motion from physics first principles, then using that simulation to predict solar eclipses. It matters as a test of the model's capacity to reason through a complex, multi-step physics problem rather than recall a fixed answer. The key takeaway: the model derives orbital dynamics from fundamentals and applies the result to forecast eclipse events.
